classes.label: Study Activity
classes.description: A record of an individual's study or training activity, including details like duration, content, and host organization.

classes.label: Overseas Activity
classes.description: A record of an individual's travel or work/study abroad, including purpose, destination, and approval details.
evidence: 所去单位英 文名称
所去单位中 文名称
出国（境）经 费来源码

classes.label: Inspection Activity
classes.description: A record of an inspection or assessment activity conducted by organizational or personnel departments.

datatype_properties.label: Study Start Date
datatype_properties.description: The start date of the study activity.

datatype_properties.label: Study End Date
datatype_properties.description: The end date of the study activity.

datatype_properties.label: Total Hours
datatype_properties.description: The cumulative actual learning time.
evidence: 指实际学习的累计时 间

datatype_properties.label: Study Content
datatype_properties.description: The content of the study.

datatype_properties.label: Training Class Name
datatype_properties.description: The name of the training class.

datatype_properties.label: Host Organization
datatype_properties.description: The name of the unit that hosts and organizes the study.
evidence: 主办和组织学习的单 位名称

datatype_properties.label: Host Organization Type Code
datatype_properties.description: The type code of the host organization.

datatype_properties.label: Study Institution
datatype_properties.description: The institution where the individual is studying.

datatype_properties.label: Study Institution Category Code
datatype_properties.description: The category code of the study institution.

datatype_properties.label: Study Result Code
datatype_properties.description: The result code of the study activity.

datatype_properties.label: Departure Date
datatype_properties.description: The date of departure abroad.

datatype_properties.label: Purpose Code
datatype_properties.description: The purpose code of the overseas activity.

datatype_properties.label: Destination Country Code
datatype_properties.description: The three-letter country code of the destination.
evidence: 用三字母国别代码，如 CHN 中国

datatype_properties.label: Destination Unit English Name
datatype_properties.description: The English name of the unit being visited.
evidence: 所去单位英 文名称

datatype_properties.label: Destination Unit Chinese Name
datatype_properties.description: The Chinese name of the unit being visited.
evidence: 所去单位中 文名称

datatype_properties.label: Dispatching Unit
datatype_properties.description: The name of the unit that dispatched the individual abroad.
evidence: 派遣本人出国（境）学 习、工作的单位名称

datatype_properties.label: Group Name
datatype_properties.description: The specific name of the dispatched group for work or study abroad.
evidence: 出国（境）工作或学习 派出团组的具体名称

datatype_properties.label: Funding Source Code
datatype_properties.description: The code for the source of funding for the overseas activity.
evidence: 出国（境）经 费来源码

datatype_properties.label: Approval Unit
datatype_properties.description: The name of the superior authority that approved the overseas activity and issued the approval document.
evidence: 批准出国（境）并签发 审批文件的上级主管部 门名称

datatype_properties.label: Approval Date
datatype_properties.description: The specific date the approval document was issued.
evidence: 批准出国（境）并签发 审批文件的具体日期

datatype_properties.label: Approval Document Number
datatype_properties.description: The document number of the approval issued by the dispatching unit.
evidence: 批准出国（境）学习工 作的单位签发的批准文 件编号

datatype_properties.label: Approved Duration
datatype_properties.description: The approved duration of stay abroad, in months.
evidence: 批准在国（境）外滞留 的期限，单位：月

datatype_properties.label: Work/Study Content
datatype_properties.description: The main content of the work or study abroad.
evidence: 出国（境）学习工作的 主要内容

datatype_properties.label: Work/Study Achievement
datatype_properties.description: The completion status and main achievements of the work or study abroad.
evidence: 出国（境）学习工作的 完成情况和主要成绩

datatype_properties.label: Expected Return Date
datatype_properties.description: The expected date of return.

datatype_properties.label: Actual Return Date
datatype_properties.description: The actual date of return.

datatype_properties.label: Passport/Permit Number
datatype_properties.description: The passport number or permit number (e.g., for travel to Hong Kong/Macau).
evidence: 通行证即“往来港澳通 行证”

datatype_properties.label: Document Validity Period
datatype_properties.description: The validity period of the document.

datatype_properties.label: Inspection Category Code
datatype_properties.description: The category code of the inspection or assessment.

datatype_properties.label: Inspection Date
datatype_properties.description: The date of the inspection or assessment conducted by the organizational/personnel department.
evidence: 组织、干部、人事部门 组派的考察组进行考察 （考核）的日期
